content:
# M3.4 Graph Edge Improvements — Implementation Plan

> **Status:** Shipped (v0.3.0)

**Goal:** Fix graph edge creation so graph-expanded retrieval produces meaningfully different results from vector-only (currently 0-2 extra results per query → target 5-15).

**Architecture:** Three fixes across two crates. Fix 1 (adapter): `RustModuleMap` resolves `crate::`/`super::` imports to real file paths. Fix 2 (kernel): `MarkdownChunker` extracts code spans, links, and code block references via `pulldown-cmark`. Fix 3 (kernel): `discover_cross_file_relations()` post-processes all chunks to find type/trait definitions and cross-file usages.

**Tech Stack:** Rust, tree-sitter, pulldown-cmark, corvia-kernel ChunkingPipeline

---
